Reliable Extensible Efficient Fast
Blockchain for DeFi, NFT & Gaming

Reef Web App

Best of all worlds

Reef chain integrates the best aspects of the most commonly used blockchains while maintaining full smart contract compatibility.
Introducing Reef chain.
Introducing Reef chain.
Introducing Reef chain.
Introducing Reef chain.

Introducing Reef chain

Reef chain is an EVM compatible blockchain for DeFi. It is fast, scalable, has low transaction costs and does no wasteful mining. It is built with Substrate Framework and comes with on-chain governance.

Solidity

Port your existing applications from Ethereum to Reef chain without modifying your Solidity code.

Liquidity bridges

Deploy established ERC-20 assets on Reef and transfer liquidity between Ethereum and Reef chain.

Reef staking

Bond your REEF coins and participate in Reef chain validation and governance.

Community governed

Reef chain is built with upgradability and long-term sustainable on-chain governance in mind.

Join the ecosystem

Sign up to get the latest from Reef

Get notified about major developments in Reef Ecosystem.

Build on Reef

Create a new DeFi app or port your existing Solidity project to Reef chain.
Quick Start

Introducing Reef chain.

The Blockchain for Next-Gen DeFi DApps.

REEF-20 coins and NFTs

Create your own tokens or port existing tokens onto Reef chain.

DEXs and AMMs

Trade any REEF-20 asset on decentralized exchanges.

Liquidity bridges

Deploy established ERC-20 assets on Reef and transfer liquidity between Ethereum and Reef chain.

Stablecoins and money markets

Hedge against volatility and earn interest on your stablecoin loans.

Reef

Built with Substrate Framework

Reef chain features next-gen blockchain technology, utilizing Nominated Proof of Stake consensus, EVM extensions, on-chain upgradability, libp2p networking and state of the art cryptography.

Governed by the Reef chain community

Nominated Proof of Stake

Validators are elected by Nominators via NPoS. At the end of every block production era, Phragmén Validator elections are held.

Upgradability

Reef chain is self-upgradable through the community elected Technical Council.

Fee burn

Reef chain incentivizes technological progress in regards to scalability by removing fee market politics.

Governance rewards

Stake Reef coin and earn rewards for participating in Reef governance.

Join the community

Participate in Reef chain validation and governance.
Reef Governance Intro
